name: Procurement Approval — eval set
description: Eval set for the Procurement Approval Agent. Covers an under-threshold plan ($162K — should auto-approve), an over-threshold plan ($600K — should reject with a budget blocker), and a malformed/missing-field plan (degradation case). Live evals run against PROCUREMENT_APPROVAL_AGENT_RESOURCE_NAME via :streamQuery.

parts.text:
